description: Registry of all skills in blitz with metadata for discovery, routing, and status tracking.

skills.name: ask
skills.description: Task intake router — classifies vague requests and dispatches to the right skill(s)

skills.name: sprint
skills.description: Full sprint cycle orchestrator — plan, implement, review. Supports --loop for use with /loop.

skills.name: implement
skills.description: Sprint implementation phase only — routes to sprint-dev

skills.name: review
skills.description: Sprint review phase only — routes to sprint-review

skills.name: ship
skills.description: End-to-end shipping workflow — review, completeness gate, quality metrics, release

skills.name: sprint-plan
skills.description: Plans sprints from roadmap epics with research-backed stories

skills.name: sprint-dev
skills.description: Implements planned sprints with coordinated agent teams in isolated worktrees

skills.name: sprint-review
skills.description: Reviews sprint quality with automated checks and parallel reviewer agents

skills.name: roadmap
skills.description: Generates phased implementation roadmaps from research documents

skills.name: research
skills.description: Investigates libraries, APIs, cloud services, and architecture patterns

skills.name: fix-issue
skills.description: Resolves GitHub issues end-to-end with root cause analysis

skills.name: refactor
skills.description: Performs safe, incremental refactoring with test verification after each step

skills.name: test-gen
skills.description: Generates tests for target files matching project conventions

skills.name: ui-build
skills.description: Builds production-grade Vue 3 UI native to the project

skills.name: browse
skills.description: Automated browser testing via Playwright MCP — captures console errors and network failures

skills.name: bootstrap
skills.description: Scaffolds new projects, features, or packages with proper conventions

skills.name: codebase-audit
skills.description: Comprehensive 5-pillar code quality audit with 10 parallel agents

skills.name: completeness-gate
skills.description: Scans code for placeholder patterns and production readiness issues

skills.name: quality-metrics
skills.description: Collects, stores, and visualizes code quality metrics over time

skills.name: dep-health
skills.description: Audits npm dependencies for vulnerabilities, outdated packages, and license compliance

skills.name: perf-profile
skills.description: Profiles bundle size, runtime performance, and Lighthouse scores

skills.name: doc-gen
skills.description: Generates API docs, component docs, architecture diagrams, and changelogs

skills.name: release
skills.description: Manages semantic versioning, changelogs, and releases

skills.name: migrate
skills.description: Handles framework, library, and tooling migrations with incremental safety

skills.name: retrospective
skills.description: Analyzes completed sessions to identify improvement patterns for plugin self-improvement

skills.name: quick
skills.description: Fast ad-hoc changes without full skill ceremony — small fixes, typos, config tweaks

skills.name: health
skills.description: Plugin health check — verifies hooks, sessions, registry, and structural integrity

skills.name: next
skills.description: Determines the logical next action based on current project and sprint state

skills.name: codebase-map
skills.description: Analyzes existing codebase across Technology, Architecture, Quality, and Concerns dimensions

skills.name: todo
skills.description: Track development todos and follow-up items — add, list, check, resolve

skills.name: integration-check
skills.description: Validates cross-module wiring: export-to-import tracing, route coverage, auth guards, store wiring

categories.sprint-lifecycle: Full sprint workflow — planning, implementation, review
categories.core-dev: Core development tasks — research, fix, refactor, test, UI, scaffold
categories.quality: Quality assurance — audit, completeness, metrics, dependencies, performance
